creator: LoN_Kamikaze@gmx.de
text:
$ pkg_info -W /usr/local/include/apr-1/apr.h
pkg_info: both apache-2.2.6_2 and apr-gdbm-db42-1.2.8_2 claim to have
installed /usr/local/include/apr-1/apr.h

I suggest someone adds a conflict.

Fix: 

Add CONFLICT with apache22 to apr-svn.
How-To-Repeat: Install www/apache22 and devel/apr-svn
